calendar.matters:
Petition For Amendment To Or Of Order Determining Title To Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Janet Myers.

Mr. Madden stated that he did not see any Examiner's notes, that the papers are clear, that there is a misstatement in the property description and that Janet never received any notice. The Petition for Amendment of Order Determining Title to Trust Assets is taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Amendment To Or Of Order Determining Title To Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Continued To May-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Determining Title To Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randi Teichman for Janet Recker (Trustee).

Ms. Teichman addressed the issue of venue, tracing of title and explained why there were two schedule-A's. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Trust Asset was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
